name: Ethiopian Ginger Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the potatoes, green beans, and carrots in boiling salted water. Cover and cook for 5 minutes. Remove the vegetables and rinse them.
2. Sauté the chiles and onion in oil until soft but not brown. Add the ginger, garlic, salt, and pepper. Stir and continue cooking for 5 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (potatoes, green beans, carrots, carrots) to the pan. Stir well and cook over medium heat until the vegetables are tender.
